textByHash.c59b826db59646cdedbfe664d33fcd13b3579f1c: Why, I'm ensuring everyone stays well fed and hydrated, of course! Fighting monsters is hard work, as I'm sure you know.
textByHash.85daca39ac8724fc85c451963ffe7238216002b6: Say, when was the last time you drank some water?
textByHash.e3ed43574505510cdad6d6a1128c305417b94df4: Off you go and refresh yourself! Don't want you collapsing in front of the Hueycoatl now, do we?
